directive.title: Core RFQ schema migration with Drizzle and seed script

auditor.summary: The generated code successfully implements the Drizzle ORM schema with all three required tables (rfqs, rfq_line_items, audit_log) with proper numeric precision, foreign key constraints, and immutable audit log orientation. The seed script correctly uses transactions, inserts 3 RFQs with 2 line items each, and creates audit log entries. Package.json scripts are properly configured. The main issue is a TypeScript type error in lib/db/index.ts where DrizzleDatabase is imported from the wrong module - this will cause a compilation failure. Additionally, the seed uses random UUIDs instead of deterministic values. The migration files are not included in the generated output (would be generated by running drizzle-kit), so those criteria are marked as PARTIAL. Overall, the code is well-structured and follows the specification closely, with only minor issues to address.

top_issues.description: Type DrizzlePostgresDatabase is defined as DrizzleDatabase<typeof schema> but DrizzleDatabase is not exported from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'. This will cause a TypeScript compilation error.
The import 'DrizzleDatabase' from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core' does not exist in the installed packages. This will cause a build failure.
The seed script uses crypto.randomUUID() which generates random UUIDs, making the seed non-deterministic. The spec calls for deterministic seed data.
